title: China's First Web Series Production License AIGC Feature Film 'Qitan' Launches on iQIYI
excerpt: Today, iQIYI exclusively launched a new work, which is no small feat— "Strange Tales: The Paper Blade Crosses the Ruins" has become the first AIGC online story
content_html:
Today, iQIYI exclusively launched a new work, which is no small feat— "Strange Tales: The Paper Blade Crosses the Ruins" has become the first AIGC online story film in China to obtain a "Network Series Production Permit" and go on air officially. It was jointly produced by Daming Innovation and iQIYI. With the background of traditional Chinese strange tales, it used AI to complete the entire process from concept to final production. The entire film is over 60 minutes long.

This work is the opening part of the "Strange Tales Trilogy," directed by Zeng Xiangcheng, with Liu Haiyang serving as AI director, and Zhao Shengnan, Yue Siyu, and Xiao Yang writing the script. The story tells an Eastern-style strange tale fantasy adventure: Bai Xiaoman, a paper master who has lost his memory, sets out to recover his memories and dives into the "hidden market," a gap between the world of the living and the dead, together with Hu Buguigui, a half-paper person. On the journey to find three treasures, such as the rootless water, a truth about obsession, redemption, and humanity gradually unfolds. Paper puppets and strange beasts move through the scenes, with eerie landscapes and lively city life interwoven, creating a unique Eastern strange tale aesthetic.

In terms of production, this film systematically tested the full workflow for long-form storytelling using AIGC, gradually building a complete technical pipeline covering creative development, prompt workflow, visual asset generation, AI rendering, 4K output, and post-production. The entire film was completed by a team of more than 20 people. In addition to core film roles such as directors and screenwriters, new types of creators such as AI asset effect artists and prompt engineers also participated deeply, integrating AI technology with the film production process.

The main creative team delved deep into classic strange tales and folk legends such as "Shan Hai Jing," "Zi Bu Yu," and "Liaozhai." They created more than 200 characters and visual assets to build the image world of Eastern strange tales. Liu Haiyang, the AI director of the film, said that the fast iteration of AIGC allows the team to constantly try different visual solutions, quickly verify creative ideas within a short time, and continuously refine expressions and visuals.

sentences.zh: 影片AI导演刘海洋表示，AIGC的快速迭代让团队不断尝试不同的视觉方案，短时间内快速验证创意，不断细化表达和视觉。

content_html_zh:
今天，爱奇艺独家推出一部新作，可谓是不小的壮举——《聊斋志异之纸刀过废墟》成为国内首部获得“网络剧制作许可证”并正式播出的AIGC网络故事电影。 由大明创新与爱奇艺联合出品。 以中国传统奇葩故事为背景，利用人工智能完成了从概念到最终制作的整个过程。 整部电影时长60多分钟。

该作品是《聊斋三部曲》的开篇，由曾祥成执导，刘海洋担任AI导演，赵胜男、岳思雨、肖阳编剧。 故事讲述了一段东方式的奇幻奇幻冒险：失去记忆的纸片大师白小满为了恢复记忆，与半纸片人胡不鬼鬼一起潜入生死界的“隐秘市场”。 在寻找无根之水等三件宝藏的旅途中，一个关于执念、救赎、人性的真相逐渐展开。 纸偶、怪兽穿插在场景中，诡异的风景与热闹的城市生活交织在一起，营造出独特的东方奇幻美学。

在制作方面，影片利用AIGC系统测试了长篇叙事的全流程，逐步构建了涵盖创意开发、提示流程、视觉资源生成、AI渲染、4K输出、后期制作的完整技术流程。 整部电影是由20多人的团队完成的。 除了导演、编剧等电影核心角色外，AI资产特效师、提示工程师等新型创作者也深度参与，将AI技术与电影制作流程融为一体。

主创团队深入挖掘《山海经》、《子不语》、《聊斋》等经典奇闻异事和民间传说。 他们创作了200多个角色和视觉资产，构建了东方奇幻的图像世界。 影片AI导演刘海洋表示，AIGC的快速迭代让团队不断尝试不同的视觉方案，短时间内快速验证创意，不断细化表达和视觉。
